creator: bsmith@boltnet.com
text:
I was digging through the UPDATING and CVS notes for 8.0 and saw FLOWTABLE.  I
did some more digging and rebooted a box with FLOWTABLE disabled.  The box
does not exhibit these same problems with it disabled, I have had it running
for a couple hours now.  This seems to be a decent work around and may indicate
where the source of the problem is.  I had tried disabling carp which didn't
fix it.

 -ben
